mapper.select:
WITH meters AS ( SELECT * FROM device WHERE `status` = 1 AND is_delete = 0 AND id_device_type IN (3,7,9) AND is_excluded_meter = 0 AND id_site = #{siteId} )
SELECT s.ac_capacity, ROUND(SUM(IF(, d.last_value, NULL)), 1) AS power_today, IFNULL(SUM(GREATEST(0, tbr.currentRead - (SELECT previousRead FROM ${tableDataReport} WHERE time = m.thisMonthMinTime AND id_device = m.id_device))), 0) AS energy_this_month FROM site s JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN device d ON d.id_site = s.id JOIN ${tableDataReport} tbr ON tbr.id_device = d.id JOIN ( SELECT tbr.id_device, MIN(IF(tbr.time >= DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.value), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), tbr.time, NULL)) AS todayMinTime, MIN(tbr.time) AS thisMonthMinTime, MAX(tbr.time) AS maxTime FROM ${tableDataReport} tbr JOIN device d ON d.id = tbr.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.id = #{siteId} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meters) > 0, d.id_device_type IN (3,7,9) AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0, d.id_device_type = 1) AND tbr.time BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.`value`), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00') AND LAST_DAY(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.`value`)) AND tbr.currentRead IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tbr.id_device ) m ON m.maxTime = tbr.time AND m.id_device = tbr.id_device WHERE s.id = #{siteId} AND s.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meters) > 0, d.id_device_type IN (3,7,9) AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0, d.id_device_type = 1) AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.`value`) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)

SELECT d.id, d.devicename, ae.total_alerts, dt.`name`, d.rating_ac_power, ae.is_communication_error FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = d.id_device_type LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.id_device, COUNT(a.id) AS total_alerts, IF(SUM(e.error_code = '1001') > 0, 0, 1) AS is_communication_error FROM alert a JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.`status` = 1 GROUP BY a.id_device ) ae ON ae.id_device = d.id WHERE d.id_site = #{siteId} AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.`status` = 1 GROUP BY d.id, d.devicename

SELECT a.id, el.name AS error_level, d.devicename, e.message, dt.`name` AS `device_type`, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(a.start_date, 'UTC', #{timeZone}),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS opened FROM alert a LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error LEFT JOIN error_level el ON el.id = e.id_error_level LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = a.id_device LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = d.id_device_type WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.`status` = 1 AND d.id_site = #{siteId} AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.`status` = 1
GROUP BY a.id

SELECT hd.id_device, hd.date_from, hd.date_to FROM hidden_data hd LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = hd.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE s.id = #{siteId} AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND hd.status = 1 AND hd.is_delete = 0

SELECT d.id, d.datatablename, d.id_device_type, d.is_excluded_meter, d.reverse_poa FROM device d JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE s.id = #{siteId} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', #{timeZone}) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL) AND (d.meter_type = 3 OR d.meter_type IS NULL) AND d.show_on_domain IN(1, 3, 4, 5, 7)
